quiz.question: What makes check-then-act unsafe without sync?
options: Two threads can both pass the check and both act
It only fails on virtual threads
quiz.explanation: Both threads observe the same pre-state and both mutate.

quiz.question: volatile guarantees…
options: Visibility of writes to that field across threads
quiz.explanation: Visibility (and ordering for that variable), not compound atomicity.

quiz.question: Best deadlock prevention for two account locks?
Unbounded thread creation under load typically causes…
quiz.explanation: Pools must be bounded; overload needs rejection/backpressure.

quiz.question: Which structure helps concurrent map updates?
quiz.explanation: ConcurrentHashMap is designed for concurrent access.

quiz.question: 502 from load balancer often means…
quiz.explanation: Gateway cannot get a valid upstream response.

quiz.question: Too many open files points to…
quiz.explanation: Socket/file descriptor leak or limit too low.

quiz.question: Blocked thread is typically…
options: Waiting on I/O or a lock

problems.title: Fix the lost update
problems.prompt: A metrics counter uses int++ from many request threads. Explain the bug and give two correct approaches.
problems.solution: int++ is not atomic. Use AtomicInteger/LongAdder, or confine increments to one thread via a queue.

problems.title: Design striped locks
problems.prompt: You need mutual exclusion per orderId without one global lock. Sketch an approach.
problems.solution: Lock[] stripes = new Lock[1024]; lock = stripes[orderId.hashCode() & 1023]; lock.lock() around critical section.

problems.title: Timeout design
problems.prompt: Service A calls B. Pick timeout/retry policy.
problems.solution: Short connect timeout; overall deadline; retry only idempotent GETs/PUTs with jittered backoff.

problems.title: Map the hops
problems.prompt: List hops from mobile app to Spring on K8s behind Cloudflare.
problems.solution: DNS → CDN/edge → LB → ingress → service → pod; TLS may terminate at edge/ingress.

problems.title: Read the symptoms
problems.prompt: p99=2s, CPU=10%, DB pool waits high. What is happening?
problems.solution: Threads blocked waiting for DB connections — not CPU bound; fix pool/query/concurrency.

problems.title: Limits
problems.prompt: Why set memory limits on a JVM pod?
problems.solution: Contain blast radius; surface leaks via OOMKilled; size heap below limit.
